title: Carreg Ateb: Vision or Dream?
standFirstCopy: Enter the caves of North Wales, journey through the collection, and transform into your mythical self, using our experimental AR experience.

title: Art Guide
standFirstCopy: Be curious: open the Art Guide to see the bigger picture, start your journey through the National Gallery and experience the wonder of art.

title: Audio guides
standFirstCopy: Make the most of your time here with a self-guided audio tour of our paintings and ticketed exhibitions.

title: The Keeper of Paintings and the Palette of Perception
